name: Koorma Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cauliflower florets, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 cups string beans, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a wok over medium heat.
2. Add onion and sauté until translucent.
3. Add garlic and continue cooking until the onions are golden.
4. Stir in tomatoes, chiles, ginger, salt, cumin, coriander, turmeric, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
5. Bring to a simmer, then stir in potatoes, cauliflower, and carrots. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in cilantro. Simmer for another 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender but firm. If needed, add additional water to form a sauce; do not add so much that it becomes soupy.
7. Steam string beans separately until bright green and crisp-tender.
8. Stir the steamed string beans into the vegetable mixture.
9. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt.
10. Serve immediately.
